manifest.title: Architecture Build Plan
manifest.description: Decision-first synthesis of the supplied blue-sky dossier, current official-source verification, production architecture, checkpointed worktree execution, validation, risks and stage gates.

charts.title: M1: nineteen checkpoints in five dependency phases
charts.subtitle: C0–C18 are inclusive. Bar length is ordinal, not effort, time or cost.

sources.label: Supplied AI-native architecture research dossier and hash manifest
Architects Registration Board — Professional Indemnity Insurance
Building Safety Regulator — Design and building work duties
Ordnance Survey NGD — Current known data issues
Active M1 blue-sky worktree implementation plan

query.sql:
WITH phase(checkpoint, sequence, outcome) AS (
  VALUES
    ('C0-C3', 1, 'Repository, identity, multimodal evidence and home dossier'),
    ('C4-C6', 2, 'Canonical model, typed editing and plan understanding'),
    ('C7-C10', 3, 'Native capture, reconstruction, fusion and deterministic 3D'),
    ('C11-C13', 4, 'Interior-design brief, variants, products and specifications'),
    ('C14-C18', 5, 'Photoreal media, decisions, implementation handoff and release')
)
SELECT checkpoint, sequence, outcome
FROM phase
ORDER BY sequence
query.description: Reproduces the five ordinal integration phases summarised from the active C0-C18 M1 checkpoint plan; sequence is not duration, effort or cost.

blocks.body:
# Architecture Build Plan

**Build:** a complete home-design system: multimodal capture/reconstruction, canonical editable geometry, agency-quality design variants, 3D/stills/video, decisions and implementation handoff.

**Evidence/limits:** dossier and official sources reviewed; repository linked locally; commercial validation, live licences and professional issue remain deferred.

**Next:** execute nineteen checkpoints C0–C18 with predefined adaptive 2/3/4-lane project-scoped worktrees. The active plan is document 08.

checkpoint_sequence.outcome: Repository, identity, multimodal evidence and home dossier
Canonical model, typed editing and plan understanding
Native capture, reconstruction, fusion and deterministic 3D
Interior-design brief, variants, products and specifications
Photoreal media, decisions, implementation handoff and release
